meta.name: Flux Scoring Config
meta.description: Reference extract of the Flux v6.10 scoring model. This file preserves model lineage for review and schema validation. It is not executable scoring logic.

source_notes: The source config described a two-tier model of core and extended dimensions.
The source config retained SKOS and Open Annotation concepts.
The source config required dual interpretations so behaviour is not pathologised.

ui_score_bands.notes: Colouring for 0-100 scores. Bands support review, not automated decisions.

dimensions.label: Efficiency
dimensions.description: Directness and precision of motion to target.

dimensions.label: Wayfinding
dimensions.description: Locate and select the right control with minimal false starts.

dimensions.label: Frustration
dimensions.description: Micro-signals of possible struggle such as rage-clicks, idle bursts or undo bursts.

dimensions.label: Trust Alignment
dimensions.description: Alignment between actions and trust or assurance cues.

dimensions.label: Cognitive Load
dimensions.description: Effort proxy from dwell, re-reads and backtracks.

dimensions.label: Collaboration
dimensions.description: Teamwork and handoffs that strengthen decisions.

dimensions.label: Sustainability
dimensions.description: Steady practice over time, low rework and efficient patterns.

dimensions.label: Ethical Alignment
dimensions.description: Adherence to ethical norms and fairness commitments.

dimensions.label: Stability
dimensions.description: Consistency and resilience in interaction patterns.

dimensions.label: Adaptability
dimensions.description: Capacity to recover, switch strategy or use support effectively.

dimensions.label: Cognitive Bias Sensitivity
dimensions.description: Exploratory indicator for bias-sensitive interaction patterns.

dimensions.label: Epistemic Confidence
dimensions.description: Exploratory indicator for confidence, checking and uncertainty signals.

dimensions.label: Ritual Consistency
dimensions.description: Exploratory indicator for repeated structured patterns and routines.

dimensions.label: Social Trust Resonance
dimensions.description: Exploratory indicator for trust relationship cues in service interaction.
